description: A tenant reports that an unauthorized vehicle is parked in their assigned parking spot.

nodes.task_description: Receive the complaint from the tenant, including the location and a description of the unauthorized vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the details of the complaint.

nodes.task_description: Check the property's parking log to see if the vehicle belongs to another tenant or guest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the vehicle is not registered with the property.

nodes.task_description: Follow property policy, which may include placing a warning sticker on the vehicle and, if not moved, contacting a towing company.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows the standard procedure for parking violations.
